title: sorbus aria var. flabellifolia
intro: Sorbus aria var. flabellifolia is a variegated form of the Whitebeam tree, known for its attractive leaves with white markings. The medicinal properties of Sorbus aria var. flabellifolia are attributed to its bark and leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. This plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Sorbus aria var. flabellifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
